---
name: Enhancement
about: Improve an existing feature, mechanic, or piece of code
title: "refactor: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What to improve

Which existing feature, system, or behavior should be changed?

## Current behavior

Describe how it works now.

## Proposed improvement

Describe the improved behavior or implementation. Include any UX, performance, or code quality goals.

## Affected domains

Which domains would this touch? (e.g. Agent, Faction, World, Rendering, UI)

## Additional context

Links to related issues, tech spec sections, or relevant code locations.
